sessionSummaries.summary: The POST / endpoint inserts into a table with a unique(userId, gameId) constraint but does not handle the constraint violation, causing unhandled 500 errors on duplicate additions. Additionally, GET /deals may return multiple rows per game (one per discounted store listing) unlike GET / which selects only the best-price listing.
keyFindings: The POST handler inserts into `wishlists` which has a unique constraint on (userId, gameId), but does not handle the constraint violation. If a user adds the same game twice, the DB will throw and the client receives an unhandled 500 error. Use `.onConflictDoNothing()` (or wrap in try/catch and return 409 Conflict) to handle this expected failure gracefully.

GET /deals joins all active store listings per game, so a game with multiple discounted listings produces multiple rows and inflates the `total` count. This is inconsistent with GET / which uses a subquery to select only the single best-price store listing per game. Apply a similar best-price subquery (or DISTINCT ON gameId) to ensure one row per wishlist item.

payload.issueBody:
## Overview
Build the API for users to manage their personal game wishlist — adding, removing, and viewing games they want to track.

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/user/me/wishlist` | Required | Get user's wishlist with current prices |
| `POST` | `/api/user/me/wishlist` | Required | Add a game to wishlist |
| `DELETE` | `/api/user/me/wishlist/:gameId` | Required | Remove a game from wishlist |
| `GET` | `/api/user/me/wishlist/deals` | Required | Filter wishlist to only games currently on sale |

## Response Shape
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "gameId": "uuid",
      "title": "Game Title",
      "coverImageUrl": "...",
      "addedAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "source": "manual",
      "bestPrice": {
        "storeName": "GOG",
        "storeLogoUrl": "...",
        "currentPriceCents": 999,
        "originalPriceCents": 3999,
        "discountPercent": 75,
        "buyUrl": "https://gog.com/game/...?pp=<affiliate>"
      },
      "allStorePrices": [...]
    }
  ]
}
```

## Tasks
- [ ] Implement all endpoints with JWT auth middleware
- [ ] `GET /wishlist` should join across `store_listings` to attach the current best price per game
- [ ] `GET /wishlist/deals` filters to games where at least one `store_listing.is_on_sale = true`
- [ ] When a game is added, also check if the user has no price alert for it and optionally prompt (frontend concern, but API should support it)
- [ ] Apply pagination to wishlist (`?page=1&limit=24`)
- [ ] Add unit and integration tests

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can add/remove games from their wishlist
- Wishlist response includes the best current price across all stores for each game
- `source` field distinguishes between manually added (`manual`) and Steam-synced (`steam_sync`) items

## Dependencies
- #15 User Authentication
- #13 Core Game & Deals REST API
